programme.title: A Picture to Remember
programme.desc: Masha is in love with Igor, her college mate, and wants to marry him, but he does not seem in much of a hurry to lead the girl to the altar.

programme.title: A Life Lived
programme.desc: After a childhood friend's death, Jake Taylor, an all-star athlete must change his life - and sacrifice his dreams to save the lives of others.

programme.title: If is a Big Word
programme.desc: It seems to the 35-year-old Yekaterina Kolesnikova that her life got on to the wrong track: instead of being a model on the catwalk in Milan she works in a factory making working clothes. And her husband, a once brilliant and talented musician, has turned out to be a local finance officer. But now Fate suddenly gives Katya a chance to go back seventeen years and try to change her life. Will it make her happy?

programme.title: Trust No 1
programme.desc: Officer Bradley (Douglas Rouillard) investigates murders believed to be part of a serial killing and quickly learns it's much bigger. With the body count rising, and nothing adding up, he turns to his last resort for help, his brother.

programme.title: Badal
programme.desc: Badal witnesses his family being massacred during a riot in his village. He is raised by a terrorist and soon sets out to exact revenge on the police officer responsible for his family's murder.

programme.title: Filhaal
programme.desc: When Sia watches her best friend Rewa slip into depression because of her inability to bear a child, she offers to be her surrogate. Trouble brews when jealousy finds its way into their relationship.

programme.title: Ek Thi Daayan
programme.desc: A supernatural thriller that tells the story of a magician haunted by a childhood memory of encountering a witch. When he falls in love with a woman who resembles the witch, he must confront his fears and uncover the truth about her identity. The film explores themes of superstition, fear, and the power of the mind in a spine-tingling and suspenseful plot.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'RUDE!' MV
programme.desc: ‘RUDE!' is a house-based dance track driven by a rhythmic groove and bouncy synths, expressing the playful rebellion of girls who defy fixed rules. It follows their mission to revive a faded ‘Super Heart' overtaken by ‘Fake Hearts', matching the song's lively yet bold spirit.

programme.title: NCT JNJM 'BOTH SIDES' MV
programme.desc: ‘BOTH SIDES' is an energetic hip-hop dance track that blends refined sound design, smooth drum beats, and witty vocals with sharp rap. Its lyrics playfully capture the idea of captivating someone with two contrasting charms, drawing them into a delightful dilemma between equally irresistible choices.

programme.title: EXO 'Crown' MV
programme.desc: 'Crown' is a hard dance song that fuses Atlanta trap drums, heavy metal guitars, and EDM synths to break genre boundaries. Siren effects and powerful vocals heighten the dramatic tension, while the lyrics liken a precious loved one to a crown coveted by many, conveying a desperate resolve to protect them at all costs.

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is sogumm famous for her unique voice and heartfelt music! This artist made herself known to the public through one TV competition show in 2019. Thanks to her wide musical spectrum and outstanding producing skills she won the competition and soon joined the record label AOMG. Of course she continued to pleasantly surprised listeners under the label. Her first album Sobrightttttttt earned both critical and commercial success and that success led her to win the coveted Rookie Prize at the 17th Korean Music Awards. She has also collaborated with a numner of A-list artists including ZICO Oh Hyuk 10CM DJ Wegun and Hoody and her ever-evolving artistry definitely makes us anticipate her future as a musician. In October this year sogumm released her full-length album Precious securing her unique spot in the industry. In this episode sogumm performs Insecurity Prescription Precious and more to show off the essence of her artistry. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this talented musician!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is risking city-pop songwriter nokdu! nokdu made his big debut in 2018 with the single Say My Name. As a graduate of The Liverpool Institute for Performing Arts founded by Paul McCartney and Mark Featherstone-Witty he covers a wide range of genres in his music ranging from Brit-pop to punk to R&B. Backed up by his academic background he boasts his outstanding ability not only as a songwriter but also a lyricist producer and singer. Also known for his stage manners he is quickly capturing the ears and souls of countless listeners. Currently he's taking part in the competition program Super Band 2. His fantastic performance in the show definitely makes us anticipate his future as a musician. In this episode nokdu performs Stay With Me Wona and more to show off the essence of his artistry. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this talented artist!

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors insight into the world's second-biggest economy, delivering in-depth discussions with newsmakers.

programme.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: In a volatile and unpredictable world, the show will be the definitive guide for the global news audience to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day. With news making executives, officials and thought-leaders from the world of business, politics and academia we will explore a story through probing interviews and nuanced conversations. The hour of programming will also highlight the most relevant stories from India which is currently one of the hottest investment destinations, but also has compelling stories that play into the Bloomberg's priority issues such as Climate change, Diversity and Technological innovation.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa, linking the market drivers from overnight in the U.S. and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep-dive analysis of the top businesses.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: The Circuit
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Reese Witherspoon and the Hello Sunshine executive team to discuss the company's founding mission and what's next for Hollywood.

programme.title: The Circuit With Emily Chang
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Disney Entertainment Co-Chair Dana Walden for an inside look at the entertainment giant's global streaming and TV ambitions.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: A uniquely emotional documentary that will touch the heart of audiences around the world. Four female climbers face the sporting challenge of a lifetime as they attempt to compete in the first ever Olympic climbing competition at Tokyo 2020.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Nikolaj Coster-Waldau begins season two and we're reminded of the delicate balance between human progress and protecting our planet.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Nikolaj travels the world to meet people transforming waste into resources showing that waste isn't something to hide -- it's something we can rethink as valuable raw material.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: From transforming concrete into a carbon sink to mining nickel from genetically enhanced plants, we meet the bold inventors preserving and adapting to nature's offerings to help humanity thrive.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Meeting humanity's insatiable demand for energy while still curbing greenhouse emissions will require creative solutions both big and small.

programme.title: Comedy Night with Kapil- Sahid Kapoor and Shradha Kapoor
programme.desc: Comedy Nights with Kapil was a popular Indian Hindi-language sketch comedy and celebrity talk show that combined a fictional household setting with a traditional interview format.

programme.title: Khatra Khatra Khatra Ep 43
programme.desc: Khatra Khatra Khatra is a comedy-reality show featuring Bharti Singh, Harsh Limbachiyaa, Punit Pathak, and others from Khatron Ke Khiladi. The show focuses on performing funny, embarrassing dares and playing pranks on each other, with losers facing humiliating punishments.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: It is a television adaptation of Alexandre Dumas' novel of the same name but with a Korean twist. Set in 17th century Joseon Dynasty, the story will follow the Crown Prince and his three guards in an unforgettable journey.

programme.title: Please dont Date Him
programme.desc: Home appliance developer Seo Jisung dreams of an easy life like a welldesigned algorithm. The “smart voice recognition AI refrigerator” she is in the process of developing accidentally gets combined with an antiterrorism super sensor chip that went missing from the National Intelligence Service Korea. Her refrigerator that couldn't even determine whether an ingredient was rotten suddenly identifies human lowlifes without even needing her to tell it to. This leads to revealing the truth about Jisung's fiancé. The man she thought of as an elite was actually a criminal. At the perfect timing, Jung Gukhee, a firefighter that seems too good to be true shows up in her life.

programme.title: W-Two Worlds Apart
programme.desc: A Love Story Between A Couple In Their Early Thirties. They Belong To The Same Era But Alternate Realities. A Surgical Resident Is Pulled Into The Webtoon World Of W, Which Was Created By Her Father, And Becomes Entangled In A Murder Mystery

programme.title: King in the Love
programme.desc: Set in the Goryeo dynasty, it tells the story of a young and ambitious monarch Won (Im Si-wan) with a desire to conquer, and two people who shape his destiny childhood friend Wang Rin (Hong Jong-hyun) and a beautiful young woman named San (Im Yoon-ah).

programme.title: Extra Ordinary
programme.desc: This is a fantasy romance drama about Dan Oh and Ha Ru, who one day find out that they are unimportant characters of a cartoon and change the storyline to make their relationship work out!

programme.title: Money Flower
programme.desc: Money Flower tells the story of people who are driven by greed. Kang Pil-Joo (Jang Hyuk) grew up at an orphanage, but he now works as a managing director of a legal team at a corporation.

programme.title: My Secret Terrius
programme.desc: Go Ae Rin suddenly loses her husband. A mysterious man, Kim Bon, lives next door. Kim Bon is a legendary NIS agent. He helps Ae Rin uncover a conspiracy, which husband became involved with.

programme.title: Ten Me
programme.desc: While in their early twenties, a medical school student, Oh Chang-min, and a dietitian, Oh Jin-hee, fall in love and marry despite his family's strong opposition. Chang-min comes from a family of wealthy doctors who believe Jin-hee is not good enough for him.

programme.title: Hide & seek
programme.desc: The Tangled Fates Of The Heiress Of A Cosmetics Company And A Woman Who Had To Achieve Everything On Her Own.

programme.title: Mother
programme.desc: A temporary teacher at an elementary school realizes that one of her students is being abused at home by her family.

programme.title: Har Har Bhakti
programme.desc: Listen to Har Har Bhakti Devotional songs and start your day with praise of gods and goddesses. These songs are composed to inspire reverence, devotion, and connection with the divine.

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Humkadam
programme.desc: Humkadam is a first of its kind show on Indian television that presents the complicated dynamics of ‘Saas' and ‘Bahu' in a clutter breaking manner. It tells the story of Tara and Shanti who are two diametrically opposite personalities, stuck in unprecedented situations. Just when they thought life had come to a full stop, is where they had to put their differences aside and start a new journey. Will they become each other's Humkadam to face all the adversities together?

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This story is about a 19yr old girl named Chunari, who dreams of marriage and a happy family. However, she becomes entangled in the chains of deceit, finding herself on the path to becoming a Dahej Dasi, which is a tradition still prevalent in the backward regions of Rajasthan. The show unfolds into a compelling drama of tradition versus rebellion, love versus oppression.

programme.title: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Hamare
programme.desc: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Humaare Is A Light-Hearted Celebrity Chat Show Hosted By One Of India'S Most Famous Rj– Pritam Singh. In Each Episode, He Will Welcome Top Female Celebrities From The Entertainment Industry Who Have Played The Roles Of Bhabhi'S & Bahu'S On-Screen, Adding A Pinch Of Glamour To The Show. These Female Celebrities Will Talk About Their Real-World, Tell Their Untold Stories And Reveal How They Live Off-Camera. What'S More? The Episodes Of This Chat Show Will Have An Enthralling Line-Up Of Gag Artists, Activities/Games & Comedy Segments, Along With The Barrel Of Laughs – Pritam.

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: On Mother's Day, first-time mother Tennyson Jacobson fights off a violent intruder during her daughter's nap time.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: For 17-year-old Sarah Wisnosky, college is all about new experiences, so when she catches the eye of a flirty frat member, she's happy to play along, then the college freshman discovers he's hiding a dark secret.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: The Millers always thought something was off when it came to their oldest son Steven, then he goes from strange to sinister, and there's no telling how far he will go to get his family's attention.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: After leaving a violent ex-husband and firing a problem employee, Cathy Whitehead builds a new life with the man of her dreams, then a stranger shows up on her doorstep one night, and she's soon drawn into the web of a familiar foe.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: After becoming involved with controversial lawyer Catherine Mehaffey, Gary Taylor realizes he's made a grave mistake and won't be able to break things off without calamitous repercussions.

programme.title: Dates From Hell: Dr. Feelgood
programme.desc: Cherie looks online for new fish in the sea she connects with a handsome doctor on his boat, they spend an afternoon which turns from sunny to very dark.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: College sophomore Gina Tenney discovers she has a stalker, then comes face to face with her tormentor and realizes she knows him.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: On Mother's Day, first-time mother Tennyson Jacobson fights off a violent intruder during her daughter's nap time.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: For 17-year-old Sarah Wisnosky, college is all about new experiences, so when she catches the eye of a flirty frat member, she's happy to play along, then the college freshman discovers he's hiding a dark secret.

programme.title: Netanagri
programme.desc: In this episode of Neta Nagari, we explain how Arvind Kejriwal and Manish Sisodia were acquitted by Rouse Avenue Court in the Delhi excise policy case. The show also discusses the Rajya Sabha elections in 10 states, key political fights, and which leaders may win or lose their seats.

programme.title: The Lallantop
programme.desc: In today's The Lallantop Show, Abhishek talks about Indians stranded in Iran and Arab countries during the Iran–Israel–US conflict and the government's response. We also cover the NIA's big update in the Pahalgam attack case and BJP's new Rajya Sabha candidate list.

programme.title: Duniyadari
programme.desc: In just four days of war, Iran has faced heavy bombings but continues to strike back at US bases and energy targets in the Gulf. With tensions rising in the Strait of Hormuz and oil markets shaking, the conflict is raising global fears.

programme.title: Kharcha Pani
programme.desc: In today's Kharcha Paani, we explain what will happen if Iran blocks the Strait of Hormuz, through which nearly 50% of India's oil imports pass. With oil prices rising and India importing about 85% of its crude, will petrol and diesel prices increase?

programme.title: Social List
programme.desc: In today's SocialList episode, Ashish Mishra talks about the ongoing war between the United States, Israel, and Iran and how social media is flooded with different reactions.

programme.title: Sehat
programme.desc: In today's Sehat show, we talk about what happens when people with diabetes skip meals and how to control low blood sugar. We also share simple tips to remove Holi colour safely from skin and how to make healthy homemade gujiya for Holi.

programme.title: The Cinema Show
programme.desc: In today's episode of The Cinema Show, we share a big update on Salaar 2 starring Prabhas. We also discuss Yash's decision to release Toxic with Dhurandhar 2 and the real reason behind the sudden trailer launch cancellation.

programme.title: Rajdhani
programme.desc: Big political buzz in Bihar as talks grow about JDU leader Nitish Kumar's son, Nishant Kumar, entering the Rajya Sabha. BJP's new list names Nitin Nabin, while Pawan Singh is left out again, adding more drama to the 2026 elections.

programme.title: Aasan Bhasha Mein
programme.desc: The US launched Operation Epic Fury and Israel carried out Operation Roaring Lion, claiming the killing of Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei and many top leaders. Iran says it fired ballistic missiles at USS Abraham Lincoln, as America deployed two powerful aircraft carriers to the Middle East.

programme.title: Netanagri
programme.desc: In this episode of Neta Nagari, we talk about Narendra Modi's visit to Israel. The show explains what PM Modi discussed with Israeli leaders and how this visit may help India in defence, technology, and trade.

programme.title: Daily Video
programme.desc: Amid rising Iran–Israel–US tensions, a 4.3 magnitude earthquake hit Gerash in Iran's Fars province, raising questions online about its timing. Some are asking if it was natural or linked to possible underground nuclear activity.

programme.title: Daily Video
programme.desc: Governance in Bihar has slowed down as Revenue Employees continue their indefinite strike since February 11, 2026. Services like income, caste, residence certificates and land records are badly affected, leaving people waiting in long queues.

programme.title: Daily Video
programme.desc: Is the US getting deeply involved in the Iran war? Donald Trump says it is about stopping nuclear and missile threats, while Marco Rubio admits pre-emptive strikes to stop Israeli and Iranian attacks, raising fears of a longer conflict.

programme.title: Aasan Bhasha Mein
programme.desc: The US launched Operation Epic Fury and Israel carried out Operation Roaring Lion, claiming the killing of Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei and many top leaders. Iran says it fired ballistic missiles at USS Abraham Lincoln, as America deployed two powerful aircraft carriers to the Middle East.

programme.title: GITN
programme.desc: Senior actor Govind Namdev speaks openly about discrimination and nepotism in Bollywood, sharing real stories from film sets and his personal struggles. He also talks about respect, stardom, and an emotional moment involving Rajpal Yadav.

programme.title: Kitabwala
programme.desc: In this episode of Kitabwala, we explore Atal Bihari Vajpayee beyond speeches and power. Author Abhishek Chaudhary shares untold stories, inner conflicts, and personal anecdotes that shaped Vajpayee's political journey and legacy.

programme.title: Kitabwala

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: A Dire Deception (LAURENCE MAILLE CASE): On November 28, 2007, Laurence Maille disappeared. It was her partner, John Zablevski, who alerted the Vimy police in Pas-de-Calais. He explained that the young woman had left in the morning for a walk with their dog and never returned. An unprecedented search was immediately launched to try to find her. Beautiful, intelligent and generous, Laurence Maille had everything to be happy about and for 18 months, had found the perfect love in her partner.

programme.title: The Case
programme.desc: A striking double heist of the "Harry Winston" jewellery store which made the headlines in 2007 in the international press.

programme.title: Bali Bombing: The Untold History

programme.desc: Tensions run high as Indonesian and Australia police work together in cracking the case, to nab the terrorists. But the search for a breakthrough sees a string of disappointments.

programme.title: Bali Bombing: The Untold History
programme.sub-title: Terrorists Wanted To Bomb Singapore Hitting Bali
programme.desc: The seeds of terror are sown long before the 2002 Bali attack. First, a "dress rehearsal" in Indonesia helps with getting the bombs just right. And then, a twist of fate in Singapore unlocks the door to Bali.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of Room 602 (Véronique Pirotton Case)
programme.desc: The Mystery of Room 602 (Véronique Pirotton Case): On October 31, 2013, Belgian politician Bernard Ouessfal rushed down the six flights of a hotel in Ostend where he had met up with his wife, Véronique, the day before. He had just found her unconscious on the bathroom floor with a mysterious plastic bag next to her. Despite the emergency rescue response, Véronique Pirotton died a few minutes later.

programme.title: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: is a lively and comedic story of Jerry's birthday celebration. Jane surprises Jerry with a cake, but playfully keeps it out of his reach, leading to a chase around the house. Amidst the chaos, the cake ends up on the fan, creating further obstacles. Jerry and Jane search desperately for the cake, leading to a comical scene of mistaken discoveries. As the clock strikes midnight, signaling the end of Jerry's birthday, they become disheartened. However, a spontaneous cake mishap involving the fan brings laughter and joy to both characters, turning the situation into a hilarious and memorable moment

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Cubs is a brand-new edutainment series showing children that learning can be fun. At this scenic Pine Tree Kindergarten, all the cubs observe the world in their own creative and wondrous ways. Here you will learn everything from the value of friendship to exploring the mysteries of science and language.Bablu Dablu Cubs will teach kids how to help others while preparing themselves for life in this beautiful world. This show is a colorful paradise for kids, teeming with adventures around every corner.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awosomeness
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awosomeness
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Armor Monster
programme.desc: One day, 12-year-old Zachary once again met the subway "0" which her mother took nine years ago, and the appearance of the subway seems to have some connection with the necklace left by her mother. In order to find her mother, Zachary stepped on the magic subway without hesitation! When the train arrived at the station, Zachary found that he had come to a magical world of elves. He also met the elf Rooney chased by hunters. In order to protect the Rooney, they fled to the underground city. Here, Zachary meets Scarlett, a red haired girl, and Zachary accidently becomes the Rooney and is regarded as a half-face hunter who is under searched with big bonus in the underground city. In order to leave the underground city to find his mother, Zachary has to agree to fight with the old wizard, the King of the underground city. Under Scarlett's training, Zachary grew up fast. In the battle, his determination to protect the Rooney inspired the strength in the necklace and defeated the old wizard. And just when the angry wizard decided to show his real strength, the real half hunter came to the rescue. The real half hunter even had the same necklace. The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron stole Edna's precious Candy Machine. Robo merges with Jerry now that he' s got awesome SuperWheels he' s ready to defeat Zitron!

programme.desc: Zitron joins a game of football between Booster and Rodeo and of course, cheats! Robo and Marley fuse to defeat him.

programme.title: RoboFuse

programme.title: RoboFuse

programme.title: VIP Pets

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they' re learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they' re guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: The Way Back Home
programme.desc: Rohan Thakur finds his true calling as he begins a journey to revisit his roots in Himachal Pradesh. Way Back Home is as much a travelogue of childhood, as of growing up. Get ready for a journey of a lifetime

programme.title: Safarnama
programme.desc: Safarnama is more than just a mere journey one wants to complete just to check out that one task from the ‘ToDo List”. It is something just one of its kind. In Safarnama, we are up for a soulfulfilling journey with Ankit Siwach that is to begin in Mumbai and cease at Ladakh. This journey is to witness numerous unseen moments and unfelt experiences via a thrilling, adventurous route. It isn't just about navigating roads using GPS but more of digging deeper into the beauty of India to understand life better.

programme.title: Saamagri Sampatti Aur Sauda
programme.desc: Saamagri Aur Sampatti is an animated series detailing the journey of various commodities that shaped India's history through their trade, usage, and spread. The history of a few key commodities for India, such as pepper, silk, coffee, and cotton, are covered in this fascinating 9-episode series.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: The Blue Realm
programme.desc: Believe it or not, many scuba divers want to see great whites up close, and photographers want dramatic shots. But how do you get the sharks to where you want them? For decades, it's been done by baiting, or “chumming” – attracting sharks with food. This practice is being questioned and banned in many countries because of a dramatic increase in shark attacks.

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Tiger sharks are responsible for more attacks on humans than any other shark aside from the great white. But do they actively prey on humans at beaches, or are these just chance encounter?

programme.title: Animal Society

programme.title: Safari Flix

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Tiger sharks are responsible for more attacks on humans than any other shark aside from the great white. But do they actively prey on humans at beaches, or are these just chance encounter?

programme.title: Stung by a Big Blue Bee!
programme.desc: A massive, electric-blue bee with a sting to match! Mark tests its painful jab while exploring its striking coloration and behavior.Meet the assassin bug: nature's silent killer. Mark gets bitten and shows how this bug dispatches prey with surgical precision.

programme.title: Prehistoric Creature Found Alive! (Trilobite Beetle)
programme.desc: It looks like something from another era—and it is! Mark discovers a trilobite beetle, a living relic that predates the dinosaurs.This giant black bee is more than just big—it's aggressive. Mark takes the sting and shows why it's one of the most feared pollinators.

programme.title: 5 Deadly Tick Bites You Need to Worry About!
programme.desc: A deep dive into the five most dangerous tick bites—what to look for, how to avoid them, and why they're more threatening than they seem.A fierce jungle standoff unfolds as a jaguar faces off with a caiman. Coyote breaks down the tactics, strength, and outcomes of this epic duel.

programme.title: I Caught a 300lb River Monster!
programme.desc: A legendary catch! Coyote reels in a 300-pound river monster and showcases the sheer strength and survival of this freshwater beast.This slime isn't alien—it's animal. But which one made it? Coyote follows the trail to uncover a gooey mystery.

programme.title: Yuck! What Creature Made This Slime?!
programme.desc: Mystery slime appears on the forest floor—what creature left it behind? The team investigates this sticky situation.As part of #CampYouTube, Mark builds a tide pool aquarium and fills it with sea creatures from the coast—perfect for learning from home.

programme.title: For the Love of Wolves!
programme.desc: Wolves need our help. Coyote partners with conservationists to share the story of these vital predators and how to support their future.

programme.title: Caught! Dangerous, Blue, & Bloated!
programme.desc: Coyote pulls up a strange, bloated blue creature from the water. Is it dangerous or just misunderstood? The team investigates.Coyote faces the GIANT silk caterpillar, whose spiny body delivers a nasty sting. Pain, science, and stunning slow-motion footage await.

programme.title: You Won't Believe This Sailfish Catch!
programme.desc: Coyote reels in a record-breaking sailfish and takes viewers on a high-seas journey filled with education, adrenaline, and ocean conservation.Looks can be deceiving. Dumb cane, a common plant, releases chemicals that scorch skin. Coyote finds out the hard way.

programme.title: Stung by the Dragon Flame Caterpillar!
programme.desc: The dragon flame caterpillar may be tiny, but its sting is fiery. Coyote gets up close—and pays the price.Even plants can pack a punch. Coyote explores a Costa Rican bush with stinging leaves that deliver an unexpectedly sharp pain.

programme.title: Snapped by World's Fastest Jaws!
programme.desc: Mark demonstrates the power of nature's fastest jaws—those of the trap-jaw ant. The slow-motion footage is as impressive as the speed.What's a mud dauber wasp? A surprisingly painful stinger! Mark shows how this lesser-known species defends its nest.

programme.title: Monster Ant Chews to the Bone!
programme.desc: A monster ant with a bite that could rival its name. Mark tests its jaws and explores its defense mechanisms in this up-close challenge.Why does parrot blood look so strange? Coyote analyzes its color, chemistry, and what secrets it may hold about avian evolution.

programme.title: Stung by a Bullet Ant! (Truth Revealed)
programme.desc: At long last, the bullet ant returns! Mark faces this infamous insect again to reveal updated insights into its sting—and why it's feared globally.Can gloves actually stop a venomous snake bite? Coyote puts bite-proof gear to the test against real fangs.

programme.title: Pinched by an Elephant Beetle!
programme.desc: The elephant beetle is huge, but its pinch may be even bigger. Coyote gets a close-up grip and tests its impressive strength.Coyote samples the infamous snake fruit. With a bizarre smell and unexpected flavor, it's a taste test that challenges more than just the tongue.

programme.title: Bullet Ant Challenge – Will It Sting?!
programme.desc: The ultimate challenge—Coyote revisits the infamous bullet ant to find out if the sting is truly as bad as legends say. Pain scale off the charts.Did Coyote really find a dinosaur? He uncovers a bizarre modern-day creature that looks like it crawled straight out of the Jurassic era.

programme.title: Ultimate Frog Scavenger Hunt!
programme.desc: Can Coyote catch every frog species in one day? This amphibian-packed episode follows a wild scavenger hunt in a lush ecosystem.A tiny puppy is covered in ticks. Coyote and team work quickly to remove them and explain the dangers of tick-borne illnesses.

programme.title: 2022 Volvo C40 Recharge
programme.sub-title: Crash & Safety Tests - 2022 Volvo C40 Recharge - Crash & Safety Tests
programme.desc: The fully electric Volvo C40 Recharge has been awarded a five-star safety rating in the 2022 Euro NCAP tests, joining its siblings in the Volvo Cars line-up as one of the safest cars on the road today. The rating continues Volvo Cars' five-star streak in Euro NCAP testing, as all tested Volvo models on sale today received five stars in their respective Euro NCAP assessments. The C40 Recharge scored especially well on occupant safety and driver assist systems, helped by one of the most extensive standard safety offers in its segment. Among many other scenarios, these safety technologies help drivers detect and avoid collisions, remain in their lane and reduce the impact of accidentally running off the road.

programme.title: Volvo Cars and Epic Games bring real-time photorealistic visualisation
programme.desc: To offer its customers the best possible user experience, Volvo Cars is bringing photorealistic visualisation technology into its next generation of electric cars through a new collaboration with Epic Games. The companies are teaming up to bring Epic's Unreal Engine game engine into upcoming Volvo cars, providing unparalleled high-quality graphics inside the cabin. Epic Games is a leading interactive entertainment and software company probably best known for Fortnite, one of the world's largest games. Epic Games also develops Unreal Engine, widely considered to be the most advanced real-time 3D creation tool used in various industries beyond games, and which will now be used by Volvo Cars for developing digital interfaces inside its cars and rendering real-time graphics in the car.

programme.title: Mercedes-Benz DRIVE PILOT
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a high-precision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a three-dimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This high-precision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Kia Sportage Exterior Design in Lunar Silver
programme.desc: A number of new technologies optimize the precision and control of the chassis in a wide variety of weather and road conditions. The standard electronic damper control (Electronic Control Suspension, ECS) in the GT-line version increases comfort and safety thanks to the continuous damping control. The system reacts to body movements and steering inputs and changes the damping behavior at lightning speed in order to counteract the vehicle's diving, pitching and rolling movements when cornering. It also adjusts the damping force in the case of obstacles in order to cope with them as comfortably as possible and to reduce the influence of post-vibrations on the wheels. A premiere for the Sportage is the “All-Terrain-Mode”, which will be available for the plug-in hybrid version with all-wheel drive. The system offers intelligent support when driving off-road or on snow by automatically optimizing the vehicle settings depending on the selected mode and thus helping the SUV to achieve maximum traction on muddy, sandy or snowy surfaces.

programme.title: The new Mercedes-Benz GLC AMG Line World Premiere Teaser
programme.desc: The new GLC is immediately recognisable as a member of the Mercedes-Benz SUV family. Standard equipment includes the AVANTGARDE exterior with Chrome package including chrome window surrounds and a new, chrome-look simulated underguard. This adds striking design features and enhances the unique proportions of the vehicle. One of the defining design highlights of the GLC is the redesigned front end, with headlamps that connect directly to the radiator grille to emphasise the vehicle's width, and the new radiator grille as part of the standard AVANTGARDE exterior, which now has a chrome surround and a sporty louvre in matt grey with chrome trim. The AMG Line has a radiator grille with Mercedes-Benz pattern. The body design is characterised by a full, spanned surface design enriched with precisely shaped edges in the sides. These emphasise the proportions, accentuate the muscular wheel arches and create a balance between elegance and off-road performance. Wheel arch liners in the vehicle colour are available from the AMG Line upwards for the first time. These accentuate the sportiness of the AMG Line, as optional equipment in conjunction with mixed tyres. Also available as an optional extra are easy-entry running boards and, from the AMG Line upwards, a Night package.

programme.title: MINI TAKES THE STATES 2022 hits the road for another epic adventure
programme.desc: The one-make championship, organized by MINI Italia with the support of ACI Sport, is ready to kick off the eleventh season. This year there are three categories that compete on the tracks of the main Italian circuits, in six exciting events from 2 July to 23 October 2022. San Donato Milanese. Now in its eleventh consecutive edition, the MINI Challenge 2022 single-make championship warms up its engines to start a season full of challenges. Also this year, MINI Italia renews its commitment to organizing one of the most exciting competitions on the Italian scene. Passion, challenge, community and the art of performance are among the values of the famous championship signed by the iconic premium brand with a sporting DNA. The six events of 2022 will see the drivers compete on the tracks of the most famous national circuits. The MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Lite, the MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Pro and the MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Evo are ready to challenge each other in a new season full of emotions. The Academy race category continues in 2022, which also sees the under 25s on the track, as part of the MINI program dedicated to young people.

programme.title: The Mercedes EQS SUV Electric Art Line Driving Video
programme.desc: With the luxury saloon EQS and the sporty executive saloon EQE, Mercedes-Benz has entered a new, all-electric era in the upper market segments as well. The EQS SUV, the third model series with this architecture developed for electric vehicles, will soon follow. The SUV offers plenty of space, comfort and connectivity for up to seven passengers in its avant-garde, luxurious interior. Thanks to powerful electric motors, responsive 4MATIC all-wheel drive and an intelligent OFFROAD driving mode, the EQS SUV is also capable of tackling light terrain with ease. The new EQS SUV shares the long wheelbase (3210 millimetres) with the EQS Saloon, but is over 20 centimetres higher. The dimensions in detail: 5125/1959/1718 millimetres (length/width/height). The interior dimensions benefit from these generous SUV dimensions and from the advantages of the purpose design tailored to the electric platform. The second row of seats can be electrically adjusted as standard. Up to four golf bags fit in the boot. A third row of seats with two additional individual seats and extensive comfort features for all passengers is available as an option.

programme.title: The world premiere of the Volkswagen ID_Buzz Interview
programme.desc: Automotions

programme.title: Colour change with the power of thought
programme.sub-title: The BMW iX Flow meets neuro-technology - Colour change with the power of thought - The BMW iX Flow meets neuro-technology
programme.desc: The Munich-based startup brainboost used the new and improved colour-changing effect in a one-off collaboration with the BMW Group at rad°hub aimed at raising awareness of mental health. With the help of brainboost, the BMW iX Flow was connected directly to the brain of the rad°hub delegates using an electroencephalograph (EEG), which records the brain's electrical activity. “The colour patterns of the BMW iX Flow react to brain activity and reflect the level of activity,” explains brainboost CEO Philipp Heiler. “Once the brain is at rest, the changes of patterns on the iX Flow also become calmer and more rhythmical.” A special animation was activated if delegates managed to maintain this state for several seconds. Thus, the participants were able to gradually calm and relax their brains under the guidance of the brainboost experts and with the help of neurofeedback via the iX Flow. This matures the knowledge of which strategies work best to specifically shut down one's own brain activity for relaxation, e.g. in everyday working life.

programme.desc: To celebrate the arrival of the new Bentayga EWB, an exclusive First Edition is now available. Subject to a limited production run for the first twelve months of orders, it combines many of the most desirable options available for the car with a package of eye-catching details found only on Bentley First Editions. First Edition badging can be seen to the exterior of the car – a theme that extends inside, with badging on the veneered fascia, as well as embroidery on the seats. Unique First Edition contrast stitching and embroidery adorns the seats and, depending on the choice of veneers, handcrafted metal overlays just 0.075 mm thick can be applied to the fascia and waistrails in the front and the rear door veneer. The First Edition offers elegant and timeless design, focusing on maximum comfort and well-being. This specifically tailored specification includes a unique 22” ten-spoke directional wheel and bright lower bumper grilles. Other additional features as standard include unique quilted seats, mood lighting, a heated steering wheel, and increased driver's assistance aids. Attention to detail is clear, from the badging that identifies the car to the jewelled caps on the fuel and oil fillers.

programme.title: Theory of Awesome
programme.desc: Sophie and Trace watch a video of skateboarders working up enough speed to complete a full loop. They then look at what makes it possible for a skateboarder to successfully get all the way around a vertical loop.

programme.title: Theory of Awesome
programme.desc: In this episode we look at "the blob" a giant air bag on the water that launched a person in the air when others jump on it, the teeterboard where acrobats land on opposite ends of a seesaw and launch the other in the sky and finally the Russian swing where acrobats rock back and forth and fling someone high into the air.

programme.title: Theory of Awesome
programme.desc: Trace and Sophie watch some mesmerizing clips of sound being used to manipulate all kinds of matter. In one experiment they breakdown how sound waves can keep water drops suspended in the air. In another demonstration they explore how sound waves can manipulate sand and water to make incredible designs.

programme.title: Theory of Awesome
programme.desc: Sophie and Trace create a simple experiment demonstrating the principles of jet propulsion then try to make a miniature hydrojet support greater and greater weight.

programme.title: People Are Awesome: Spotlight
programme.desc: A dragon suit, a Victorian doll transformation, a painting reveal, and more.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Professional photographer Virginia loves her cottage-style home in the city - but lately it doesn't love her back. A look that was once charming is now dated and in need of a serious makeover, starting with the worn out floors and ancient kitchen appliances. Designer Samantha Pynn applies eco-friendly kitchen ideas, energy saving appliances and 'up-cycles' existing items in the living room to create a beautiful Modern Country oasis in the city.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Janelle and Manuel are young professionals looking for more space. With one child tagging along on the tour already, they need a place for their growing family. They might need to do some renovations, but they want everything to be perfect.

programme.title: Design For You: Trends
programme.desc: Susan Grieg takes us on a tour of the iconic design of Beechwood Gardens, we explore social media to see what advice and tips we can find for designing your outdoor patios.

programme.title: Luxury Life

programme.title: Home Rescue
programme.desc: In Tullamore county Offaly, Carol Scott lives with her 16-year-old daughter Moira, diagnosed with autism in sixth class.

programme.title: Duncan's Thai Kitchen
programme.desc: Duncan falls in love with the quiet village forest settings of Surat Thani where he cooks for the monks in the local monastery before visiting the stunning river markets.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Building their dream home was easy for Ania and Walter - but the hard work was deciding how to decorate their vast master bedroom. By dividing then unifying the space, designer Samantha Pynn transforms this bare bones bedroom into a sophisticated boudoir, with a luxurious eco-friendly bed, that's a haven for reading, writing and romance.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Lindsay has outgrown her childhood bedroom and is ready to leave her hand-me-down furniture and kiddy colours in the past. Lindsay, like every teenager, needs a room for the three S's: sleeping, studying and socializing! Designer Samantha Pynn steps in to create a space that is functional, eco-fabulous and can grow with her -- proving that a youthful look can be achieved without looking childish.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Jonathan and Kerry are in the market for a new home to share memories in with their family with a budget of 12 million dollars, Real Estate Agent Tav Schembri is challenged to find the family their dream home.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Nathan, a start up company owner and his fiance Kelsey, a owner of a holistic nutrition company, are open to purchasing a house anywhere in the GTA.

programme.title: Accidental Chef
programme.desc: This week, Melvyn explores Taiwan. He scales the altitudes of Taiwan's central mountains to meet an aboriginal woman. With her, Melvyn discovers some unique local produce and learns how to prepare a dish that dates back to the hunting days of the Atayal men.

programme.title: Notes from the USA
programme.desc: Musicians Foy Vance and Laetitia Sheriff head to the US to discover some of the country's most iconic cities.

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Paul and Nick are in Madison County, North Carolina in the heart of Southern Appalachia. The roots of Appalachian music and dance can be traced to the 18th century Ulster-Scots settlers. The chefs meet 7th generation ballad singer Sheila Kay Adams and Appalachian dancer and musician Phil Jamison – both of Ulster-Scots descent - to find out more about these traditions.

programme.title: USA Through Food
programme.desc: A journey through the USA, through the diverse food scenes of six vibrant cities.

programme.title: Destination Route 66
programme.desc: Rest your head after a long day driving Route 66. Check in to these great accommodations along the way!

programme.title: Destination Route 66
programme.desc: Mother Nature along the Mother Road. Check out these can't miss natural wonders on Route 66.

programme.title: Destination Route 66
programme.desc: Route 66 is lined with wonderful and informative attractions. Here are just a few of those must-see stops!

programme.title: Destination Route 66
programme.desc: Sink your teeth into these delicious bites from snacks to five star dining on Route 66.

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Paul and Nick cook for some descendants of the Reverend McGregor, the Ulster-Scot who led five ships to New Hampshire in 1714. In the same graveyard where Rev McGregor is buried, Paul discovers a gravestone with his own father's name on it, and wonders if there could be a connection.

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Paul and Nick are in Washington D.C. - the capital city and political stronghold of the United States. They are cooking for former White House Press Secretary and Ulster-Scot - Mike McCurry and his friends and family.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: From lobster lovers to badass lobsterwomen, the charming seaside village of Rockland offers something for everyone—especially during the Rockland Lobster Festival, a delightful combination of games, art, and some of the freshest lobster you'll find anywhere.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: For over 50 years, bikers from around the world have gathered in Colorado to race the Durango & Silverton Narrow Gauge Railroad Train through the Rocky Mountains, over two mountain passes.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: Just two hours north of Charlotte, Banner Elk offers a wide array of year-around activities for outdoor enthusiasts, but is most well known for their annual Highland Games, one of the largest celebrations of Scottish culture and tradition anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Into America's Wild
programme.desc: Step off the beaten path and connect to your inner trailblazer in this cross-country journey to some of the most beautiful but little-known landscapes of North America. Into America's Wild is a non-stop ride via kayak, train, bike, hot air balloon and more that explores the transformational allure of wild places and the human connection we all share with the natural world.

programme.title: USA Through Film 2
programme.desc: Actor and director Jordan Spiro (Ozark, Night Comes On) spent childhood vacations with her family in New Orleans. For Spiro, the city's heritage as the birthplace of jazz is reflected in its mélange of arts and food culture that always feels fresh, inviting, and joyous, even after a lifetime of visits. “There's this ‘all senses on overload' side to New Orleans that takes my breath away every time.”

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric travels to the mountain towns of Durango and Telluride, Colorado to explore the backcountry by ski, snowshoe, and ice axe.
